name: update-available
prompt: Update Claude Code to the latest version
expected_behavior: Script detects current version, fetches latest, installs update, verifies installation

name: already-up-to-date
prompt: Check if Claude Code needs updating
expected_behavior: Script reports current version matches latest, exits with success

name: network-fallback
prompt: My internet is flaky, update Claude Code
expected_behavior: Script tries GitHub API, falls back to npm registry on failure

name: proxy-environment
prompt: Update Claude Code (I use a proxy at 127.0.0.1:7890)
expected_behavior: Script reads HTTPS_PROXY env var and uses it for all network requests

name: update-fails-manual-command
prompt: Try updating Claude Code even if it might fail
expected_behavior: Script retries twice, then prints manual npm install command with correct version
